case_title: ANTHONY GAYLORD CHERRY JR. VS. DIVVY HOMES INC.

docket_entries.description: REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD WITH NEW FILING- SUBMITTED
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERRY JR., ANTHONY GAYLORD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-30-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY GAYLORD CHERRY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,574.21 FILED BY CHERRY JR., ANTHONY GAYLORD AS TO DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
EXHIBIT (PLAINTIFF - ANTHONY GAYLORD CHERRY JR) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: NOV-28-2022 AT 3:30PM}
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LEANNA YEE, VP OF COMPLIANCE. FILED BY DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES INC.
REMARK:PLAINTIFF'S ADDITIONAL SET OF EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY CHERRY JR., ANTHONY GAYLORD DIVVY HOMES INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERRY JR., ANTHONY GAYLORD
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED DEC-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES INC.

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY GAYLORD CHERRY JR IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LEANNE YEE, VP - COMPLIANCE. PARTIES STATE IN COURT THAT THERE IS CURRENTLY AN OPEN CASE OF THE SAME CLAIM IN ROCKDALE COUNTY, GEORGIA COURT. COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR PROGRESS REPORT, APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE ON APRIL 03, 2023 AT 1:30 P.M. TO UPDATE IF PARTIES WILL PURSUE THIS CASE IN COURT ROCKDALE COUNTY, GEORGIA COURT. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT IN COURT PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF THEIR TOLL FREE NUMBER AND EMAIL ADDRESS FOR CONTACT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-05-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY GAYLORD CHERRY JR. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LEANNE YEE (VP OF COMPLIANCE). PLAINTIFF ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHEREBY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $3,172 VIA A CHECK TO BE MAILED TO PLAINTIFF'S HOME ADDRESS ON FILE. DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES INC. WILL TAKE INTO CONSIDERATION OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CLEAR AND MORE DIRECT EMERGENCY REPORTING FOR NON-RESIDENCE. PROGRESS REPORT SET FOR JUNE-05, 2023 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT 506. IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE, THEN CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ("DWP"). IF THERE IS AN APPEARANCE, HEARING WILL BE CONDUCTED FOR JUDGEMENT DECISION. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERRY JR., ANTHONY GAYLORD AS TO DEFENDANT DIVVY HOMES INC.
